properties.name: Customer Id
properties.comments: System-assigned UUID. Persists across all channels and downstream systems.

properties.name: Email
properties.comments: PII - Primary contact key. Must be unique across all customers. Masked in non-production.

properties.name: First Name
properties.comments: PII - Customer given name. Masked in non-production.

properties.name: Last Name
properties.comments: PII - Customer family name. Masked in non-production.

properties.name: Acquisition Channel
properties.comments: Channel of first registration. Values: Web, Store, Referral, Partner. Set once; immutable.

properties.name: Current Segment
properties.comments: Current segment assignment: Gold, Silver, Bronze, or New. Updated when LTV crosses a threshold.

properties.name: Lifetime Value
properties.comments: Cumulative net revenue across all orders. Updated on each confirmed order.

properties.name: Is Active
properties.comments: Soft-delete flag. Inactive customers are retained with full order history.

properties.name: Created At
properties.comments: UTC timestamp of customer registration.

properties.name: Updated At
properties.comments: UTC timestamp of most recent profile update. Maintained for audit purposes.

collections.comments: Core customer entity. Represents a unique individual or organisation registered with RetailCo across all channels.

properties.name: Address Id
properties.comments: System-assigned UUID for the address record.

properties.name: Customer Id
properties.comments: FK to Customer. Addresses are retained with the customer record.

properties.name: Address Type
properties.comments: Classification of address purpose. Values: Billing, Shipping, Both.

properties.name: Is Primary
properties.comments: Designates the primary billing address. Exactly one address per customer must be true.

properties.name: Street
properties.comments: PII - Street line of the address. Masked in non-production.

properties.name: City
properties.comments: PII - City of the address. Masked in non-production.

properties.name: Postal Code
properties.comments: PII - Postal or ZIP code. Masked in non-production.

properties.name: Country
properties.comments: PII - Country of the address. Masked in non-production.

collections.comments: One or more physical addresses on file for a customer. Typed and designated as primary where applicable.

properties.name: Segment History Id
properties.comments: System-assigned UUID for the history row.

properties.name: Customer Id
properties.comments: FK to Customer.

properties.name: Segment
properties.comments: Segment value at this point in time. Values: Gold, Silver, Bronze, New.

properties.name: Effective From
properties.comments: Date from which this segment assignment was effective (inclusive).

properties.name: Effective To
properties.comments: Date to which this segment assignment was effective (inclusive). Null indicates the current active row.

collections.comments: SCD Type 2 history of segment assignments. Enables point-in-time cohort analysis at any historical date.

properties.name: Order Id
properties.comments: System-assigned UUID. The primary key of the order entity.

properties.name: Customer Id
properties.comments: FK to Customer. An order is linked to exactly one customer.

properties.name: Promotion Id
properties.comments: FK to Promotion. Optional; null when no promotion is applied to the order.

properties.name: Channel
properties.comments: Commercial channel through which the order was placed. Values: Web, Mobile, In-Store, Partner. Immutable after order creation.

properties.name: Order Status
properties.comments: Current lifecycle status. Values: Pending, Confirmed, Shipped, Delivered, Cancelled.

properties.name: Order Created At
properties.comments: UTC timestamp of order creation.

properties.name: Gross Order Value
properties.comments: Sum of all line item extended prices before any order-level promotional discount.

properties.name: Discount Amount
properties.comments: Order-level discount amount applied from the associated promotion. Zero when no promotion is applied.

collections.comments: A purchase transaction initiated by a customer through one of the four commercial channels.

properties.name: Line Item Id
properties.comments: System-assigned UUID for the line item.

properties.name: Order Id
properties.comments: FK to Sales Order. Cascade delete applies.

properties.name: Product Id
properties.comments: FK to Product. References the product at the time of order.

properties.name: Quantity
properties.comments: Units ordered. Must be greater than zero.

properties.name: Unit Price
properties.comments: Actual price per unit charged at time of order. May differ from current product list price.

properties.name: Discount Pct
properties.comments: Line-level discount fraction between 0.0000 and 1.0000. Distinct from any order-level promotion discount.

collections.comments: A single product entry within an order. The atomic grain of purchase data. Cascade delete from Sales Order.

properties.name: Promotion Id
properties.comments: System-assigned UUID for the promotion.

properties.name: Promotion Name
properties.comments: Descriptive name of the promotion for reporting and analysis.

properties.name: Discount Type
properties.comments: Type of discount applied. Values: Percentage, Fixed, BOGO.

properties.name: Discount Value
properties.comments: The discount magnitude. Fraction of gross value for Percentage; absolute amount for Fixed; 0 for BOGO.

properties.name: Start Date
properties.comments: Inclusive start date of the promotion validity period.

properties.name: End Date
properties.comments: Inclusive end date of the promotion validity period. Must be on or after Start Date.

collections.comments: A discount campaign that may be optionally applied to an order. Captures type, value, and validity period.

properties.name: Product Id
properties.comments: System-assigned UUID. Primary key used across all downstream systems.

properties.name: SKU
properties.comments: Stock-Keeping Unit code. Unique alphanumeric identifier across all products.

properties.name: Product Name
properties.comments: Published product name as maintained by the merchandising team.

properties.name: List Price
properties.comments: Current standard published selling price. No price history is required.

properties.name: Cost Price
properties.comments: RESTRICTED - Per-unit cost from the primary supplier. Optional; accessible to finance roles only.

properties.name: Category Id
properties.comments: FK to Category. Must reference a leaf-level (Level 3) category only.

properties.name: Supplier Id
properties.comments: FK to Supplier. One primary supplier at any point in time. Supplier history not tracked.

properties.name: Is Active
properties.comments: Soft-delete flag. Inactive products are retained to preserve order history integrity.

collections.comments: A sellable item in the RetailCo catalogue. Assigned to exactly one leaf-level category and one primary supplier.

properties.name: Category Id
properties.comments: System-assigned UUID for the category.

properties.name: Parent Category Id
properties.comments: FK to parent Category. Null for root-level (L1) categories.

properties.name: Category Name
properties.comments: Descriptive name of the category as used by the merchandising team.

properties.name: Category Level
properties.comments: Hierarchy level indicator. Values: 1 (Root), 2 (Mid), 3 (Leaf). Products may only be assigned to Level 3.

collections.comments: Hierarchical product classification with up to three levels: Root (L1), Mid (L2), Leaf (L3). Products assigned to L3 only.

properties.name: Supplier Id
properties.comments: System-assigned UUID for the supplier.

properties.name: Supplier Name
properties.comments: Trading name of the supplier organisation.

properties.name: Country
properties.comments: Country of operation for the supplier.

properties.name: Lead Time Days
properties.comments: Standard calendar days from purchase order placement to goods receipt. Must be greater than zero.

properties.name: Contact Email
properties.comments: Optional procurement contact email address at the supplier.

collections.comments: A vendor that supplies products to RetailCo. Each product has exactly one primary supplier.

comments:
============================================================
RetailCo Analytics Platform  |  Data Model
Version 1.1  |  April 2025
Domains: Customer, Order, Product
Layers: Conceptual > Logical (3NF) > Physical (Snowflake Star Schema)
DBML Specification: https://dbml.dbdiagram.io/home/
============================================================

============================================================
LAYER 2 - LOGICAL MODEL (Third Normal Form)
Full entity definitions with platform-neutral data types.
Primary keys, foreign keys, unique constraints, not null,
default values, column and table notes for business context
and governance classification. Entity and column names use
Proper Case with spaces. No platform-specific types.
No index definitions (technology-independent layer).
============================================================
